feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Enclose Table entries in a TR
entry.content:
Hi,
I need to move all the entries of my Z*table in a TR in SAP DEv system & to other SAP QA system.
I happened to add the below in my TR Task attributes:

Table Contents R3TR TABU TDDAT
Table Contents R3TR TABU TVDIR
 I see the column Function and when i click on the key icon(Fig 1), what should i mention under the table keys icon(Fig 2)?

Are these enough to move my table contents to other system? Or is there any more i am missing?

entry.title: Custom report
entry.content:
Can we create custom report via Developer Extensibility/BTP as we create in key user extensibility.

And also want to know can we download custom report as csv file via Developer Extensibility/BTP?

If yes, could you please provide me reference link/blog?

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: BAPI/FM To update field STCD1 in KNA1 for existing customer
entry.content:
Hello ,

Kindly help me with an BAPI or FM to update customer tax number1 (STCD1) in table KNA1 for an existing customer 

Regards,

entry.title: Implementation will not be called
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a BADI with multiple use is checked in SE18. However, in SE19, the multiple use is unclick and the implementation will not be called. What steps should I do in order to make this BADI is called? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: ALV CONTROLL TREE
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

As shown in the image, I am facing a problem that I would like to solve:

When I select the values C1 and C2 either by marking them or by checking the checkboxes and then click on the "Delete" button, the rows A1 and B1 are unfortunately also counted in the background.

Normally, I use the methods GET_CHECKED_ITEMS and GET_SELECTED_NODES from the class CL_GUI_ALV_TREE_SIMPLE. However, the EXPORTING parameters of these methods return the wrong index. In my example, the values C1 and C2 are assigned indices 3 and 4, respectively, because the rows A and B1 are also counted in the background.

Therefore, I am asking for your help in solving this issue.

Thank you in advance.

Radouane

entry.title: CDS Annotation Semantics.dateTime causes time zone change
entry.content:
Hey Experts,

I have a view extension where I create a timestamp:

 

extend view I_LogisticsOrder with ZX_MyViewExtA
{
  // Full timestamp for display
  concat( afko.getri, afko.geuzi ) as ZConfOrdFinDateTime
}

 

Now I want to show this timestamp as a proper date the list. It works but the time shown is in UTC and not in the correct time zone. If I remove the @Semantics.dateTime: true it shows the correct time stamp. There are ways to convert the time to a time zone but I dont want to add unnecessary complexity.

 

extend view C_ObjPgMaintOrder with ZX_MAINTORDEXT
...
{
...
    @ui: {
      lineItem: [{ position: 1346, importance: #HIGH }]
    }
    @EndUserText.label: 'Confirmed Order Finish Date/Time'
    @Semantics.dateTime: true
    _MaintenanceOrder._Order.ZConfOrdFinDateTime as ZConfOrdFinDateTime
}

 

Any ideas how to deal with this?

entry.title: How to change the value of a parameter used in several selection screens
entry.content:
The below program has 2 selection screens 1000 and 1001, both having the same parameter DUMMY, and we go from 1000 to 1001 by pressing F8 (Execute), and back to 1000 by pressing F3 (Back).

If I type a value in the parameter DUMMY in the selection screen 1001, press Enter, go back to the selection screen 1000, this value is not shown in the selection screen 1000, and by debug we can see that the global variable DUMMY has been cleared by the system.

How to retain the parameter value?

For information, if I type the value in the selection screen 1000 and go to the selection screen 1001, the value is shown. It seems to be a backward-only "issue".

REPORT zzsro_selection_screen_include.

TABLES sscrfields.

PARAMETERS dummy.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 1001.
  SELECTION-SCREEN COMMENT /1(83) text1001.
  SELECTION-SCREEN INCLUDE PARAMETERS dummy.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 1001.

INITIALIZATION.
  text1001 = 'Screen 1001'.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN.
  IF sy-dynnr = '1000' AND sscrfields-ucomm = 'ONLI'.
    sscrfields-ucomm = ''.
    CALL SELECTION-SCREEN 1001.
  ENDIF.
  IF sy-dynnr = '1001' AND sscrfields-ucomm = 'CRET'.
    sscrfields-ucomm = ''. " Execute -> stays on 1001
  ENDIF.

entry.title: How can I get PR number in ME52N?
entry.content:
I have an enhancement in ME52N to add a header tab. However, I use below coding to get PR number but failed.

      DATA:  ls_mereqheader TYPE REF TO cl_po_header_handle_mm.
      DATA: lt_header TYPE mepoheader.

      CREATE OBJECT ls_mereqheader.

      CALL METHOD ls_mereqheader->get_data
        IMPORTING
          ex_data = lt_header.

OR

      DATA: dynpfields TYPE TABLE OF dynpread.
      CALL FUNCTION 'DYNP_VALUES_READ'
        EXPORTING
          dyname               = 'SAPLMEGUI' "sy-repid
          dynumb               = '3327'   "sy-dynnr
*         TRANSLATE_TO_UPPER   = ' '
*         REQUEST              = ' '
*         PERFORM_CONVERSION_EXITS             = ' '
*         PERFORM_INPUT_CONVERSION             = ' '
*         DETERMINE_LOOP_INDEX = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_IN_CURRENT_SCREEN       = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_IN_MAIN_SCREEN          = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_IN_STACKED_SCREEN       = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_ON_SCR_STACKPOS         = ' '
*         SEARCH_OWN_SUBSCREENS_FIRST          = ' '
*         SEARCHPATH_OF_SUBSCREEN_AREAS        = ' '
        TABLES
          dynpfields           = dynpfields
        EXCEPTIONS
          invalid_abapworkarea = 1
          invalid_dynprofield  = 2
          invalid_dynproname   = 3
          invalid_dynpronummer = 4
          invalid_request      = 5
          no_fielddescription  = 6
          invalid_parameter    = 7
          undefind_error       = 8
          double_conversion    = 9
          stepl_not_found      = 10
          OTHERS               = 11.
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
      ENDIF.

What is wrong for the above coding? or any other way to get the PR number? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Add a select row in existing tablecontrol
entry.content: I create this tablecontrol by SAP table control wizard. How can I add the tab select button in the first column? Just like the 2nd screen capture. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Adobe Forms external image is not rendered
entry.content:
I am trying to put an external image on an ADOBE forms. Therefore, I created a form that contains one element, which is an image node with binding to the only parameter of the form. To print, I created the following report:

 

 

  call function 'GUI_UPLOAD'
    exporting
      filename   = filename
      filetype   = 'BIN'
    importing
      filelength = flen
    tables
      data_tab   = upload_file.

  image type xstring.

  call function 'SCMS_BINARY_TO_XSTRING'
    exporting
      input_length = flen
    importing
      buffer       = image
    tables
      binary_tab   = upload_file.

  data(out) = value sfpoutputparams( preview = abap_true ).
  call function 'FP_JOB_OPEN'
    changing
      ie_outputparams = out.
      
  call function '/1BCDWB/SM00000142'
    exporting
      binary = image.

  call function 'FP_JOB_CLOSE'.

 

 

Running this program and uploading a JPG image the form shows with an empty image. Where do I go wrong?

entry.title: Routing Operation View CDS
entry.content:
Hi expert

I want to create custom cds view with Routing Operation View data

Is any data source for this view to create custom CDS view

 

Please help me.

Thanks and best Regards

Daroi

entry.title: Cannot save more than 1 record in tablecontrol
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have create a header tab with a table control. However, when I input more than 1 row in the table control. Only the first record is saved. When I debug the program, after the user exit EXIT_SAPLMEREQ_008, the record is not being save into the custom table. After I debug to the program LMEGUICJJ in the method save, it committed to the custom table after a statement CALL METHOD my_factory->commit( ). How can I save more than 1 records into the custom table? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: userexit_check_vbap process twice
entry.content:
Hi All,

I hope when user press Enter, then check some condition.

I wrote logic in userexit_check_vbap, when I debug code, it's process the logic twice.

How can I do that it trigger only one time

Please Help, Thanks all!

entry.title: SAP ECC on premise write file to SFTP
entry.content:
Hi,

I understand that in Employee central payroll (ECP) it is possible to read/write files from SFTP as per Note 2007916. It can be SF SFTP or any remote server that accepts files with HTTPS protocol. 

My question is whether it is possible in SAP ECC on premise system to read/write files from SFTP? (I know FTP is possible in SAP ECC)

entry.title: Billing document header & item line wise in screen (VF01, VF02, VF03 ) level additional fields
entry.content:
Hi All,

This is sukumar,

I want additional fields in screen (vf01, vf02, vf03) header & Item level. i have added VBRK table through append structure next step SE51 screen painter level added additional fields then se80 program(SAPMV60A)60001 screen below your references  but it showing error billing header screen please provide any suggestion & blogs

Its showing subscreen tab in billing document header when click tab it show error.

Regards

Sukumar N

entry.title: ABAP Unit for local classes inside function group?
entry.content:
I have local class(LCL_CUT) created inside function group ZFG_BP.

method get_activity of class lcl_cut, tries to access global variables of ZFG_BP.

 

METHOD get_activity
 IF gv_act_id = 'YCUS'. "this gv_act_id is part of Fn Group ZFG_BP
   **logic to calculate*
 ENDIF.
ENDMETHOD.

 

 I need to write abap unit for method get_activity, but I don't know how would I set gv_act_id  = 'YCUS' for my unit test method call?

As of now gv_act_id = ' ', which makes sense because I am calling this method individually and there is no prior call/screen click to set gv_act_id value.

entry.title: Download an internal table into excel file with extension '.xls'.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

My requirement is to download an internal table into excel file with extension '.xls'.  I have tried the below 3 ways to do it.

  1. Using FM ' SAP_CONVERT_TO_XLS_FORMAT '
  2. Using Class  cl_salv_table=>to_xml (Convert to xstring and download using GUI_download)
  3. Concatenate the texts into a string with separators tab space and new line. (then convert it to xstring and download using GUI_download).

With these methods, i can download the file successfully. But whenever i open it, i getting a pop up message "The file format and extension of 'File.xls' don't match. The file could be corrupted or unsafe. ". 

We should not get this pop-up message as bot will use the file in further process.

NOTE: I can create the file with (.xlsx) or (.csv) extension and i don't face this issue. But our clients want only in .xls format. I can try to convice them to use any other extension, but before that i would like to if it is possible to create the excel file with '.xls' extension and open it without the popup message.

I have searched to my best in the community but i got no solution for this. I can't use abap2xlsx as well.

Any suggestions will be appreciated.

entry.title: How to Add Predefined Values to the ADSMTP-REMARK Field in T-Code BP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a task to enhance the tcode BP so that when the client adds email addresses in the ADSMTP-REMARK field, they have predefined values to choose from, like a search help or drop-down list. Is that possible and how?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP JOB log pages limit
entry.content:
Hello Everyone.  

I have below query related to SAP Job log 

a) what is the maximum SAP job log page view limit in SAP.
b) can we search on pages not viewable from SAP job log.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: xfp output of Adobe form to be converted pdf
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have spool generated for ADOBE form but in binary format. I am using the FM, 'CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB2_PDF' to convert it to PDF. But getting the error that spool job type is 'BINARY', so getting the error that, 'no abap spool job is ready' , though I have the spool request. Pl provide the solution.

Rgds,

G.Khadeer Basha
